# AppZoro Technologies
> AppZoro Technologies Inc. is a software and mobile app development company headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, USA. We design and build custom web applications, mobile apps (iOS and Android), and enterprise software for startups and mid-size businesses.

## Canonical site
- https://appzoro.com/
